## Checklist

- [ ] Added `meta.ts`
- [ ] Added `demo.tsx`
- [ ] Added preview (`public/previews/{category}/{slug}/preview.mov`)
- [ ] Ran `npm run build:registry`
- [ ] Ran `npm run lint`
- [ ] Ran `npm run test`
- [ ] Responsive (mobile + desktop)
- [ ] No `console.log`
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets/API keys
- [ ] No unnecessary dependencies
- [ ] No unnecessary hardcoded colors/assets
